_comment: Shared cross-repo regression fixtures for runSmartMatch / smartMatcher.js. Both fixlo-frontend and fixlo-spectre must assert all cases pass. AUTO=75, REVIEW=50. Gateway: bank=80pts, name=20pts. Person: name=60pts, account=40pts (no bank). TrueMoney: name=100pts.

cases.description: Gateway: Wealth.wave bank match (80) + name contains bank (20) → 100 → AUTO_MAPPED

scanned.name: wealth.wave

masterAccounts.account_name: Wealth.wave Gateway

cases.description: Gateway: Apay bank match only (80) → AUTO_MAPPED (80 ≥ 75)

scanned.name: other agent

masterAccounts.account_name: Apay Gateway

cases.description: Gateway: Apay bank (80) + name contains bank keyword (20) → AUTO_MAPPED

scanned.name: apay

masterAccounts.account_name: Apay Gateway

cases.description: Gateway: DPay bank match only, null name → score=80 → AUTO_MAPPED (80 ≥ 75)

masterAccounts.account_name: DPay Gateway

cases.description: Person: exact name (60), no bank = 60 → PENDING_REVIEW (60 < 75)

scanned.name: สมชาย ใจดี

masterAccounts.account_name: สมชาย ใจดี

cases.description: Person: exact name (60) + exact account (40) = 100 → AUTO_MAPPED
